requirement.description: The gateway shall periodically transmit the consolidated door status to the instrument cluster.

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when all doors are closed
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; All doors closed; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen = 0 transmitted periodically with correct cycle time
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_per_001_all_closed_periodic(can_bus):
    msgs, timestamps = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) > 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)
    assert verify_periodicity(timestamps, EXPECTED_CYCLE_TIME)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when at least one door is open
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; At least one door open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_per_002_door_open_periodic(can_bus):
    msgs, timestamps = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) > 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)
    assert verify_periodicity(timestamps, EXPECTED_CYCLE_TIME)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission remains active without door state change
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen value repeated consistently in every periodic frame

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission resumes after door state transition
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; All doors initially closed
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen updates correctly and continues periodic transmission
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_per_004_state_change_then_periodic(can_bus):
    msgs, timestamps = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 4.0)
    assert len(msgs) > 5
    states = [decode_any_door_open(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states or 1 in states
    assert verify_periodicity(timestamps, EXPECTED_CYCLE_TIME)

test_cases.title: Verify no loss of periodic door status transmission
steps: Monitor GW_VehicleStatus for extended duration (5 seconds)
test_cases.expected_result: Continuous periodic transmission without missing cycles
